mapper.sql: SELECT ac.id, ac.user_id, u.email AS user_email, ac.company_name, ac.job_title, ac.posting_date, ac.source_type, ac.status, ac.is_favorite AS favorite, ac.archived_at, ac.deleted_at, ac.created_at, ac.updated_at, ( SELECT MAX(jp.revision) FROM job_posting jp WHERE jp.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS latest_posting_revision, ( SELECT MAX(ja.created_at) FROM job_analysis ja WHERE ja.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS latest_job_analysis_at, ( SELECT MAX(ca.created_at) FROM company_analysis ca WHERE ca.application_case_id = ac.id ) AS latest_company_analysis_at FROM application_case ac JOIN users u ON ac.user_id = u.id
